title: insert into t (select * from t) bogus in multithreaded execution
key_bug_features: insert into table using select in multithreaded context
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t (i INT, j VARCHAR(50), k DATE, l FLOAT DEFAULT 0.0);
INSERT INTO t (i, j, k) VALUES (1, 'test', '2023-01-01');
INSERT INTO t (i, j, k, l) SELECT i + 1, j || ' updated', k FROM t;
INSERT INTO t (i, j, k) SELECT NULL, NULL, NULL FROM t;
INSERT INTO t (i, j, k) SELECT i, j, k FROM t WHERE i < 5;
